ddls:
CREATE TABLE "vehicles" (
  "vehicle_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each vehicle */,
  "vin" TEXT /* Vehicle Identification Number (VIN) */,
  "make" TEXT /* Make of the vehicle */,
  "model" TEXT /* Model of the vehicle */,
  "year" INTEGER /* Year of manufacture */,
  "registration_number" TEXT /* Registration number of the vehicle */,
  "owner_id" INTEGER /* ID of the owner of the vehicle */,
  "vehicle_type_id" INTEGER /* ID of the vehicle type */,
  "color" TEXT /* Color of the vehicle */,
  "mileage" INTEGER /* Current mileage of the vehicle */,
  "engine_size" REAL /* Engine size of the vehicle */,
  "transmission_type" TEXT /* Transmission type of the vehicle */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the vehicle record was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the vehicle record was last updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("vehicle_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_vehicles_vehicle_type_id FOREIGN KEY ("vehicle_type_id") REFERENCES vehicle_types ("vehicle_type_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_vehicles_owner_id FOREIGN KEY ("owner_id") REFERENCES owners ("owner_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "owners" (
  "owner_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each owner */,
  "owner_name" TEXT /* Full name of the owner */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email address of the owner */,
  "phone" TEXT /* Phone number of the owner */,
  "address" TEXT /* Address of the owner */,
  "city" TEXT /* City of the owner */,
  "state" TEXT /* State of the owner */,
  "zip_code" TEXT /* Zip code of the owner */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the owner record was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the owner record was last updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("owner_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "vehicle_types" (
  "vehicle_type_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each vehicle type */,
  "type_name" TEXT /* Name of the vehicle type */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the vehicle type */,
  "average_fuel_efficiency" REAL /* Average fuel efficiency of the vehicle type */,
  "average_maintenance_cost" REAL /* Average maintenance cost of the vehicle type */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the vehicle type record was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the vehicle type record was last updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("vehicle_type_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "telemetry_data" (
  "telemetry_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each telemetry data point */,
  "vehicle_id" INTEGER /* ID of the vehicle the data belongs to */,
  "timestamp" TEXT /* Timestamp of the data point */,
  "cycle_sec" INTEGER /* Cycle second of the data point */,
  "timestep" INTEGER /* Timestep of the data point */,
  "speed_mph" REAL /* Speed in miles per hour (mph) */,
  "accel_meters_ps" REAL /* Acceleration in meters per second squared (m/s^2) */,
  "latitude" REAL /* Latitude of the vehicle */,
  "longitude" REAL /* Longitude of the vehicle */,
  "altitude" REAL /* Altitude of the vehicle */,
  "battery_voltage" REAL /* Battery voltage */,
  "engine_temperature" REAL /* Engine temperature */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the telemetry data record was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the telemetry data record was last updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("telemetry_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_telemetry_data_vehicle_id FOREIGN KEY ("vehicle_id") REFERENCES vehicles ("vehicle_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "data_files" (
  "file_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each data file */,
  "vehicle_id" INTEGER /* ID of the vehicle the file belongs to */,
  "file_path" TEXT /* File path to the data file */,
  "file_size" REAL /* Size of the data file in MB */,
  "upload_date" TEXT /* Date the file was uploaded */,
  "file_format" TEXT /* Format of the data file */,
  "data_type" TEXT /* Type of data in the file */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the data file record was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the data file record was last updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("file_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_data_files_vehicle_id FOREIGN KEY ("vehicle_id") REFERENCES vehicles ("vehicle_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "telemetry_files" (
  "file_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each telemetry file */,
  "vehicle_id" INTEGER /* ID of the vehicle the file belongs to */,
  "file_path" TEXT /* File path to the telemetry file */,
  "file_size" REAL /* Size of the telemetry file in MB */,
  "upload_date" TEXT /* Date the file was uploaded */,
  "file_format" TEXT /* Format of the telemetry file */,
  "data_type" TEXT /* Type of data in the telemetry file */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the telemetry file record was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the telemetry file record was last updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("file_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_telemetry_files_vehicle_id FOREIGN KEY ("vehicle_id") REFERENCES vehicles ("vehicle_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "users" (
  "user_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each user */,
  "user_name" TEXT /* Full name of the user */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email address of the user */,
  "role" TEXT /* Role of the user (e.g., data engineer, analyst, admin) */,
  "password" TEXT /* Password of the user */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the user record was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the user record was last updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "access_logs" (
  "access_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each access event */,
  "telemetry_id" INTEGER /* ID of the telemetry data being accessed */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user accessing the telemetry data */,
  "access_date" TEXT /* Date when the telemetry data was accessed */,
  "access_type" TEXT /* Type of access (e.g., view, download) */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the access log record was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the access log record was last updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("access_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_access_logs_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_access_logs_telemetry_id FOREIGN KEY ("telemetry_id") REFERENCES telemetry_data ("telemetry_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "vehicle_maintenance" (
  "maintenance_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each maintenance record */,
  "vehicle_id" INTEGER /* ID of the vehicle the maintenance record belongs to */,
  "maintenance_date" TEXT /* Date of the maintenance */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the maintenance performed */,
  "cost" REAL /* Cost of the maintenance */,
  "service_center_id" INTEGER /* ID of the service center where the maintenance was performed */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the maintenance record was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the maintenance record was last updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("maintenance_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_vehicle_maintenance_service_center_id FOREIGN KEY ("service_center_id") REFERENCES service_centers ("service_center_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_vehicle_maintenance_vehicle_id FOREIGN KEY ("vehicle_id") REFERENCES vehicles ("vehicle_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "service_centers" (
  "service_center_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each service center */,
  "service_center_name" TEXT /* Name of the service center */,
  "location" TEXT /* Location of the service center */,
  "contact_email" TEXT /* Contact email for inquiries about the service center */,
  "phone" TEXT /* Phone number of the service center */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the service center record was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the service center record was last updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("service_center_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "vehicle_diagnostics" (
  "diagnostic_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each diagnostic record */,
  "vehicle_id" INTEGER /* ID of the vehicle the diagnostic record belongs to */,
  "diagnostic_date" TEXT /* Date of the diagnostic */,
  "diagnostic_code" TEXT /* Diagnostic code */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the diagnostic issue */,
  "resolution" TEXT /* Resolution of the diagnostic issue */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the diagnostic record was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the diagnostic record was last updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("diagnostic_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_vehicle_diagnostics_vehicle_id FOREIGN KEY ("vehicle_id") REFERENCES vehicles ("vehicle_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "vehicle_inspections" (
  "inspection_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each inspection record */,
  "vehicle_id" INTEGER /* ID of the vehicle the inspection record belongs to */,
  "inspection_date" TEXT /* Date of the inspection */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the inspection performed */,
  "result" TEXT /* Result of the inspection */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the inspection record was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the inspection record was last updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("inspection_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_vehicle_inspections_vehicle_id FOREIGN KEY ("vehicle_id") REFERENCES vehicles ("vehicle_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "vehicle_repair" (
  "repair_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each repair record */,
  "vehicle_id" INTEGER /* ID of the vehicle the repair record belongs to */,
  "repair_date" TEXT /* Date of the repair */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the repair performed */,
  "cost" REAL /* Cost of the repair */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the repair record was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the repair record was last updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("repair_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_vehicle_repair_vehicle_id FOREIGN KEY ("vehicle_id") REFERENCES vehicles ("vehicle_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "vehicle_inspections_results" (
  "result_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each inspection result */,
  "inspection_id" INTEGER /* ID of the inspection the result belongs to */,
  "item" TEXT /* Item inspected */,
  "result" TEXT /* Result of the inspection */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the result */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the inspection result record was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the inspection result record was last updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("result_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_vehicle_inspections_results_inspection_id FOREIGN KEY ("inspection_id") REFERENCES vehicle_inspections ("inspection_id")
)
